title: Unfaithful 8x
description: This is a 'simplistic' texture pack that and my friends created. I hope you like those 8x textures. More downloads coming soon for other versions such as 1.8.
body:
This is a pack I started back in August 2024 with some of my friends. It started small but is now our biggest accomplishment yet.

Explore Minecraft with the default textures but 8x8 style, which makes for a new experience.

Thanks to @XZanast @Goulask79, and the rest of the discord team behind this project!
